enforced: extensions are loaded via plugins: (RuboCop >=1.72), not the deprecated require: mechanism
AllCops.NewCops: enable opts into new cops by default as RuboCop releases them
Style/FrozenStringLiteralComment, Style/StringLiterals, Metrics/MethodLength, Metrics/ClassLength, Metrics/AbcSize, and Layout/LineLength are machine-enforced
Lint/UnusedMethodArgument and Lint/UnreachableCode catch dead/unreachable code
note: plugins: requires the referenced gems (rubocop-performance, rubocop-rspec) to be present in the target project's Gemfile; this baseline does not install them (SCOPE-OUT-003).
